summary: Patrick McKenzie announces a brief one-week blogging hiatus because a high school friend is visiting him in rural Japan. He notes the rarity of such visits given his remote location and prioritizes hosting over writing. The post is essentially a short personal note to readers.
key_points: McKenzie is taking a week off from blogging to host a visiting friend from high school
He highlights the unusual nature of receiving visitors in rural Japan
He maintains a backlog of articles he plans to write
money_quotes: Friends from high school do not routinely drop by Japanese rice fields.
key_insight: A brief personal note revealing McKenzie's life in rural Japan and his commitment to keeping readers informed even during short breaks.
